titleStmt.title: SII 41.24: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 24. (A.R. No. 23 of 1905.) Kīḻūr, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: North wall of the gōpura in front of the Vīraṭṭāṉēśvara temple.

p.hi: Vijayanagara, Vijayarāya Mahārāya, Saka 1368, Kshaya, Tulā śu. 10, Aviṭṭam, Friday = 1446 A.D., September 30.

summary.p: It states that when the members of the Idaṅgai and Valaṅgai classes were oppressed severely by the pradhānās who demanded kāṇikkai tax every Year they migrated from their homes leading to cessation of worship and other calamities and that Aṇṇappa-uḍaiyār got a royal order to the effect that the officials should not collect iṉavari and idaṅgaivari from the community. It is further stated that since the order was engraved only in some places, a fresh order from Nagarasa uḍaiyār was secured. There is a copy of this inscription at Tiruveṇṇainallūr. (See ARE. No. 476 of 1921.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastusvastiśrī . manmahāmaṇḍalīśvaran hariya Irāya vipāṭaṉ pāṣai
kkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ muvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭa nāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa
nāṭu kuṭātāṉ catucamuttiṟātipati kecaveṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya śrī viraprādāpa
vicayarāya mahārāyar brativirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam Āyirattu
muṉūrṟṟu Aṟupattu Eṭṭiṉmel cellāniṉṟa kṣaya saṅvasaṟattut tulā
nāyaṟṟup pūrvvapakṣattu veḷḷik kiḻamaiyum dacamiyum peṟṟa Aviṭṭattu nāḷ
vaḻutilampaṭṭu Ucāvaṭi nāṭum karaṇikkarum toṇṭaimāṉārum kaccirāyaru
m kūṭi Iruntu Irāyar Irāyita pramāṇattukku nākaraca Uṭaiyar nirupa paṭikku Iṉavari
Iṭaṅkaivari kaḻittu kalluveṭṭuvittapaṭi . Inta Irācciyattil valaṅkai I
ṭaṅkai Iraṇṭu vakaiyil palakuṭikaḷaiyum pratānarkaḷ maṉmantiṟaṅkaḷ to
ṟum kāṇikkai koṇṭu Ittāle kuṭikaḷ Uḷḷatum nalaṅki piṟa rācciyame
Ōṭippoy Ittāle teyvastatāṉaṅkaḷu pūcai puṉarkāram tiru
nāḷum kulaintu Irācciyam vicātiyum Āy maṉittar Uḷḷatum
cettu nalaṅkiṉapaṭi Āle Irāyar tiru Uḷḷampaṟṟi Aruḷi vala
ṅkaiyil Iṭaṅkaiyil Uṇṭāṉa kuṭikaḷukkum kāṇikkai koḷḷak kaṭavatalla Eṉ
ṟu Aṇṇappa Uṭaiyāṟku Irāyar Irāyatam tiruuḷḷam paṟṟi Aru
ḷiṉa Aḷavil Inta Iṉavariyum Iṭaṅkai variyum kaḻittu Aṇṇappa Uṭaiyar cila cila Iṭaṅkaḷuk
kuk kalluveṭṭuvittum cilacila Iṭaṅkaḷukkuk kalluveṭṭātapaṭi Āle Intac cey
tikaḷ nākaraca Uṭaiyārkku viṇṇappañ ceytapaṭiāle Immariyātikku nākaraca Uṭaiyar niru
pam tarukaiyil Innāḷ mutalukku valaṅkai Iṭaṅkaiyil palakuṭikaḷukkum Inavari Iṭaṅkaivari
Eṉṟu koḷḷakkaṭavatu Alla Ākavum Itukku Irācakarattukku Uṭkuṭuttu kalaivu vicārittava
ṉ civatturoki Irācatturoki nāṭṭutturoki Iṉatturoki paṭṭatum paṭṭu keṅkai karaiyil kavilai vataipaṇṇiṉa
van pāvattile pokak kaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum Nāgarasana baraha Ponnambala nāthana baraha ^1^ koṅkarāyar Eḻuttu
karumaūrk kāṅkaiyar Eḻuttu Irāyavipāṭak koṅkarāyar Eḻuttu karumauḷar cetirāyar Eḻuttu
Irāyavipāṭak kāṅkaiyar Eḻuttu kulacekarak kāṅkaiyar Eḻuttu virapaṇṭiyak kāṅkaiyar
Eḻuttu tirukkovalūrp paṟṟuk karuṇākara nampi Eḻuttu kāṅkaiyar Eḻuttu tiru Aṇṇāmalai
paṭṭar Eḻuttu kaḷappāḷar Eḻuttu Karaṇi Sōmanāthana baraha Sītaṇana baraha Devarāsana baraha Jayinana baraha In Kannaḍa.
toṇṭaiymāṉār Eḻuttu kaccirāyar Eḻuttu
patiṉēḻupaṟṟu nāṭṭavar Eḻuttu paṉiraṇṭupaṟṟu nāṭṭavar Eḻuttu viraṉārāyaṇa
m capaiyār nāṭṭār Eḻuttu viracoḻapurappaṟṟu nāṭṭavar Eḻuttu nāṅkūrp paṟṟu muṭiya
ṉuṟ paṟṟu capaiyār nāṭṭār Eḻuttu Iraṇṭāṟṟukku naṭuc capaiyār nāṭṭār Eḻuttu§
Digital edition of SII 41.24 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
